benefits.description: Loved the results from BPC 157 in terms of cell regeneration and repair.

side_effects.description: Developed a tumor beneath the ear and precancerous cell clusters on the cervix during or after BPC 157 use. Cannot confirm causation but suspects possible acceleration of unwanted cell growth.

protocol_notes: Injected in thigh and stomach (not at site of injury). Warns that BPC 157 may non-selectively promote cell growth including potentially cancerous cells. Cannot definitively attribute tumor/precancerous cells to BPC use.
